title: Cotunneling theory and multiplet excitations: emergence of asymmetric line shape in inelastic scanning tunneling spectroscopy of correlated molecules on surfaces
summary: Recent advances in on-surface chemistry, combined with scanning probe microscopy, have enabled the synthesis of correlated molecules on surfaces and the characterization of their chemical and electronic properties with unprecedented spatial resolution. Low-energy magnetic excitations of individual molecules are frequently investigated by scanning tunneling spectroscopy (STS) and often appear as symmetric step-like features in the differential conductance as a function of bias voltage. The interpretation of such steps is well established within cotunneling theory and effective model Hamiltonians (e.g., Hubbard- and spin-based models). Here, we extend the cotunneling formalism to general multireference systems. We show that multireference character, together with orbital-dependent and strongly asymmetric tip/substrate couplings, can produce pronounced asymmetric line shapes in inelastic STS. These results provide an alternative microscopic mechanism for the asymmetric peaks and dips near the Fermi level frequently observed in STS experiments.

AI.tldr: 扩展共隧穿理论到多参考系统，揭示轨道依赖和非对称耦合可导致非对称STS线形
AI.motivation: 扫描隧道光谱实验中经常观察到费米能级附近的不对称峰和谷，传统共隧穿理论和有效哈密顿量模型主要解释对称阶梯状特征，需要新的微观机制来解释这些不对称现象
AI.method: 将共隧穿形式扩展到一般的多参考系统，考虑轨道依赖性和强非对称的尖端/基底耦合效应
AI.result: 多参考特性与轨道依赖、强非对称耦合相结合，可在非弹性扫描隧道光谱中产生显著的不对称线形
AI.conclusion: 为STS实验中经常观察到的费米能级附近不对称峰和谷提供了替代的微观机制解释

title: Magnetic Weyl semimetals: Interplay of band topology and magnetism
comment: 58 pages, 21 figures. In this version, some figures have been omitted due to copyright restrictions
summary: We review recent theoretical and experimental developments in magnetic Weyl semimetals, focusing on the electromagnetic responses emerging from the interplay of their electronic band topology and magnetism. We begin by introducing the fundamental topological properties of the electrons in Weyl semimetals, and provide an overview of the characteristic phenomena arising from their band topology, such as the anomalous Hall effect and chiral magnetic effect. The materials exhibiting the magnetic Weyl semimetal state, with ferromagnetic ordering, antiferromagnetic ordering, etc., are listed. The possible mechanisms for their magnetism are discussed in connection with the Weyl electrons. Non-uniform magnetic textures and magnetization dynamics are expected to exhibit a topological interplay with the Weyl electrons, manifesting as spinmotive force and spin torques. We also review the magnetotransport phenomena such as domain wall magnetoresistance, studied by mesoscopic scale calculations. Finally, we mention the spin transport properties studied in magnetic Weyl semimetals. The topological nature of Weyl electrons reviewed here is important not only for fundamental physics, but also for the potential application to low-dissipative electronics and spintronics devices.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了磁性Weyl半金属的最新理论和实验进展，重点探讨了其电子能带拓扑与磁性相互作用产生的电磁响应现象。
AI.motivation: 磁性Weyl半金属结合了拓扑电子结构和磁性，为探索拓扑与磁性的相互作用提供了独特平台，具有基础物理研究和低耗散电子学/自旋电子学应用的双重价值。
AI.method: 采用综述方法，首先介绍Weyl半金属的基本拓扑性质和相关现象，然后系统梳理具有铁磁、反铁磁等磁序的材料体系，分析其磁性机制与Weyl电子的关联，并讨论非均匀磁结构和磁化动力学与拓扑电子的相互作用。
AI.result: 总结了磁性Weyl半金属中由拓扑-磁性相互作用产生的多种现象：反常霍尔效应、手征磁效应、自旋动力力、自旋力矩、畴壁磁阻等输运特性，以及相关的自旋输运性质。
AI.conclusion: Weyl电子的拓扑性质不仅对基础物理研究至关重要，也为开发低耗散电子学和自旋电子学器件提供了潜在应用前景，磁性Weyl半金属是探索拓扑与磁性相互作用的重要平台。

title: Two-dimensional bound excitons in the real space and Landau quantization space: a comparative study
summary: The Landau quantization space is based on the respective motion of the electron and hole in a magnetic field and can provide a new route to understand the bound exciton behaviors observed in the experiments. In this paper, we study the two-dimensional exciton properties of monolayer WSe$_2$ in both the real space and Landau quantization space. Focusing on the excitons of zero center-of-mass momentum, we calculate its energy spectrum in both spaces, with the results agreeing well with each other. We then obtain the diamagnetic coefficients and root-mean-square radius, which are consistent with the $s$ state results from the experiments. More importantly, in the exciton state $nl$, we find that the dominant electron-hole pair component may shift with the magnetic field and the Coulomb interactions, and reveal that the magnetic field will drive the dominant component to be the free electron-hole pair $\{n_e=n+l-1,n_h=n-1\}$, whereas the Coulomb interactions drives it to be the pair of the lower index.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过实空间和朗道量子化空间分析单层WSe₂二维激子性质，发现磁场和库仑相互作用会影响激子态中电子-空穴对的主要成分分布。
AI.motivation: 朗道量子化空间基于电子和空穴在磁场中的相对运动，为理解实验中观察到的束缚激子行为提供了新途径。研究旨在探索单层WSe₂二维激子在实空间和朗道量子化空间中的性质。
AI.method: 研究单层WSe₂二维激子在实空间和朗道量子化空间中的性质，聚焦于零质心动量的激子，计算两个空间中的能谱，获得抗磁系数和均方根半径，并分析激子态中电子-空穴对主要成分的变化。
AI.result: 实空间和朗道量子化空间的计算结果相互吻合良好；获得的抗磁系数和均方根半径与实验中的s态结果一致；发现激子态中主导的电子-空穴对成分会随磁场和库仑相互作用变化：磁场驱动主导成分变为自由电子-空穴对，而库仑相互作用驱动其变为低指数对。
AI.conclusion: 朗道量子化空间为理解二维激子性质提供了有效框架，磁场和库仑相互作用对激子态中电子-空穴对成分分布有重要影响，这有助于深入理解实验中观察到的激子行为。

title: Electron scattering by a magnetic monopole in solid-state experiments
summary: The scheme of experiment for studying electron scattering in the field of a magnetic monopole in two dimensional electron gas is proposed. The differential scattering cross section is obtained in the eikonal approximation. For unpolarized initial electron, the differential cross section coincides with that in the field of an infinitely long solenoid, up to redefinition of a magnetic flux. It is shown that the scattered electron becomes polarized even for unpolarized initial electron. Besides, in an experimental setup similar to the Hall experiment, the spin polarization arises in the direction perpendicular to the electron current.

AI.tldr: 提出研究二维电子气中磁单极场中电子散射的实验方案，获得程函近似下的微分散射截面，发现与无限长螺线管场相似但电子出现自旋极化
AI.motivation: 研究磁单极场中电子散射的物理特性，探索二维电子气系统中磁单极效应的实验观测可能性
AI.method: 提出实验方案，采用程函近似计算微分散射截面，分析非极化初始电子的散射行为
AI.result: 微分散射截面与无限长螺线管场相似（磁通重新定义后），非极化初始电子散射后出现自旋极化，霍尔实验类似装置中产生垂直于电流方向的极化
AI.conclusion: 磁单极场中电子散射产生独特的自旋极化效应，为实验观测磁单极效应提供了可行方案

title: Probing Electromigration of Oxygen Vacancies in YBa$_2$Cu$_3$O$_{7-δ}$ Devices by Multimodal X-ray Techniques
summary: Control of oxygen vacancies by electrical currents in complex oxides such as YBa$_2$Cu$_3$O$_{7-δ}$ (YBCO) has attracted considerable interest due to the relative simplicity of its implementation and its potential for both fundamental studies and the tuning of superconducting device properties. However, the structural evolution and depth-dependent effects associated with current-based techniques remain largely unexplored, particularly with respect to the connection between optical signatures and the spatial distribution of oxygen vacancies. Here, we combine nanoprobe X-ray Diffraction (NanoXRD), Cu K-edge X-ray Absorption Near-Edge Structure (XANES), X-ray Photoelectron Spectroscopy (XPS), electrical transport, and optical measurements to reveal modifications induced in YBCO microbridges by pulsed electromigration. We observe a c-axis expansion correlated with spectroscopic features of oxygen depletion in the Cu-O chains, and we confirm that oxygen redistribution, crystallographic changes, and copper coordination evolve consistently across techniques. Notably, the spatial profile of unit-cell expansion closely follows the optical contrast observed after electromigration, demonstrating that the different signatures capture the same underlying oxygen reordering. We further show that optical microscopy cannot reliably capture bipolar electromigration involving strong resistance modifications, as surface deoxygenation appears largely irreversible. Taken together, our findings provide a significant step toward a microscopic understanding of current-assisted oxygen migration in YBCO and establish a framework for effectively exploiting vacancy control in high-temperature superconducting devices.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过多种表征技术揭示了脉冲电迁移在YBCO微桥中引起的氧空位重排、晶体结构变化和铜配位演化，建立了光学对比度与晶胞膨胀空间分布的一致性，并发现光学显微镜无法可靠检测涉及强电阻变化的双极电迁移。
AI.motivation: 电流控制复杂氧化物（如YBCO）中的氧空位因其实现相对简单且具有基础研究和调控超导器件性能的潜力而备受关注。然而，基于电流技术的结构演化和深度依赖效应，特别是光学特征与氧空位空间分布之间的关系，仍未被充分探索。
AI.method: 结合纳米探针X射线衍射（NanoXRD）、Cu K边X射线吸收近边结构（XANES）、X射线光电子能谱（XPS）、电输运测量和光学测量，研究脉冲电迁移在YBCO微桥中引起的改性。
AI.result: 观察到c轴膨胀与Cu-O链中氧耗尽的光谱特征相关；确认氧重排、晶体结构变化和铜配位在不同技术中表现一致；晶胞膨胀的空间分布与电迁移后观察到的光学对比度紧密对应；发现光学显微镜无法可靠检测涉及强电阻变化的双极电迁移，因为表面脱氧过程基本不可逆。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为理解YBCO中电流辅助氧迁移提供了重要的微观认识，并为有效利用高温超导器件中的空位控制建立了框架。

title: A Residual-Attention Physics-Informed Neural Network for Irregular Interfaces and Multi-Peak Transport Fields
summary: In complex engineering systems such as electro-thermal-fluid coupling, rapid and accurate prediction of multi-physics fields is essential for advanced applications like digital twins and real-time condition monitoring. Traditional numerical methods often suffer from high computational latency, whereas standard Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs) frequently fail to capture critical local features, such as irregular interfaces, localized high-gradient regions, and multi-peak transport structures. To address these limitations and provide high-fidelity intelligent predictions for engineering decision-making, this paper proposes a Residual-Attention Physics-Informed Neural Network (RA-PINN) as a powerful surrogate modeling engine. The proposed method incorporates residual learning and attention enhancement into the network backbone to improve the representation of oblique transition structures, narrow charge layers, and distributed hotspots while strictly preserving global field consistency. To evaluate its effectiveness as an intelligent prediction framework, three representative benchmark cases are constructed, including an oblique asymmetric interface, a bipolar high-gradient charge layer, and a multi-peak Gaussian charge migration field. Under unified training settings, the proposed RA-PINN is systematically compared with a standard pure PINN and an LSTM-PINN in terms of average error, local maximum error, structural similarity, and convergence behavior. The results show that RA-PINN consistently achieves the best overall performance across all benchmark cases, demonstrating its tremendous potential as a highly reliable core inference engine for the condition monitoring and digital twin modeling of complex multi-physics engineering systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种残差注意力物理信息神经网络（RA-PINN），用于解决复杂工程系统中多物理场快速准确预测的问题，相比传统PINN能更好地捕捉局部特征。
AI.motivation: 在电-热-流耦合等复杂工程系统中，需要快速准确的多物理场预测来支持数字孪生和实时状态监测。传统数值方法计算延迟高，标准PINN难以捕捉不规则界面、局部高梯度区域和多峰传输结构等关键局部特征。
AI.method: 提出残差注意力物理信息神经网络（RA-PINN），在网络主干中融入残差学习和注意力增强机制，以改善对倾斜过渡结构、窄电荷层和分布式热点的表示，同时严格保持全局场一致性。
AI.result: 在三个代表性基准案例（倾斜不对称界面、双极高梯度电荷层、多峰高斯电荷迁移场）中，RA-PINN在平均误差、局部最大误差、结构相似性和收敛行为方面均优于标准PINN和LSTM-PINN，展现出最佳整体性能。
AI.conclusion: RA-PINN作为高度可靠的核心推理引擎，在复杂多物理工程系统的状态监测和数字孪生建模中具有巨大潜力。

title: Phases of itinerant anyons in Laughlin's quantum Hall states on a lattice
summary: We study phases of itinerant anyons when hole-doping Laughlin-like states in fractional Chern insulators (FCIs). In light of the recent observation of time-reversal-broken superconductivity near FCIs in van der Waals materials, a theoretical understanding of doped fractional quantum Hall states on a lattice has been developed by Shi and Senthil [Phys. Rev. X 15, 031069], reviving old ideas about "anyon superconductivity". We test these ideas analytically within an effective parton mean-field theory and numerically with variational Monte Carlo, pointing out that the predicted state depends on whether the Laughlin order at $ν=1/m$ is described by a U(1), or an SU(m) Chern-Simons field, the latter implying a symmetry between the m parton species. Our results demonstrate that the interplay between band Berry curvature and effective anyon dispersion has crucial implications for which anyonic phase is realized. In the experimentally relevant scenario of hole-doping the $ν=1/3$ fermionic FCI, our results uncover a mechanism for the formation of an anyon superconducting state of half-integer central charge in the case when the energetically cheapest excitations are the fundamental 1/3 charge anyons, bypassing the need for these anyons to pair into charge-2/3 composites, which has generally been assumed in similar anyon superconductivity constructions.

AI.tldr: 研究在分数陈绝缘体中掺杂Laughlin态时产生的巡游任意子相，揭示了能带贝里曲率与任意子色散相互作用对相选择的关键影响，并发现了一种绕过任意子配对形成电荷-2/3复合体的任意子超导机制。
AI.motivation: 最近在范德华材料中观察到分数陈绝缘体附近的时间反演对称性破缺超导性，这激发了对晶格上掺杂分数量子霍尔态的理论理解需求。研究旨在测试"任意子超导性"的理论构想，特别是在实验相关的ν=1/3费米子分数陈绝缘体空穴掺杂情况下。
AI.method: 采用有效部分子平均场理论进行解析分析，并结合变分蒙特卡洛方法进行数值模拟。研究比较了Laughlin序在ν=1/m时由U(1)或SU(m)陈-西蒙斯场描述的两种情况，后者意味着m个部分子物种之间的对称性。
AI.result: 研究表明能带贝里曲率与有效任意子色散的相互作用对实现何种任意子相具有关键影响。在ν=1/3费米子分数陈绝缘体空穴掺杂的实验相关场景中，发现当能量最低的激发是基本1/3电荷任意子时，会形成半整数中心荷的任意子超导态，绕过了这些任意子配对形成电荷-2/3复合体的传统要求。
AI.conclusion: 研究为任意子超导性提供了理论支持，揭示了在分数陈绝缘体中掺杂Laughlin态时，能带拓扑性质与任意子动力学之间的相互作用决定了最终相的性质，并提出了绕过传统任意子配对机制的新型超导形成途径。

title: A family tree for hafnia
summary: Several candidate reference phases have been proposed to discuss phase transitions and ferroelectricity in hafnia in recent years. Although these proposals comply with crystallographic requirements, a physically compelling rationale connecting parent and daughter phases is often lacking. This problem is aggravated by the absence of clearly dominant polarization switching pathways, making it difficult to formulate a robust physical criterion for identifying the relevant high-symmetry states. Here we use first-principles calculations to show that pressure provides a simple and robust criterion for establishing physically meaningful family relationships among many hafnia polymorphs, including the monoclinic ground state and the technologically relevant ferroelectric phase, and their respective parent structures. Our simulations also reveal several previously unreported phases, including higher-energy structures that act as common ancestors of the widely discussed cubic and orthorhombic reference phases.

AI.tldr: 压力作为物理标准，用于建立氧化铪多晶型之间的家族关系，揭示新相并识别立方和正交相的祖先结构
AI.motivation: 目前关于氧化铪相变和铁电性的研究中，虽然提出了多种候选参考相，但缺乏连接母相和子相的物理依据，且没有明确的主导极化切换路径，难以建立识别相关高对称态的标准
AI.method: 使用第一性原理计算，以压力作为简单而稳健的标准，建立氧化铪多晶型之间的物理意义家族关系
AI.result: 揭示了多个先前未报道的相，包括作为广泛讨论的立方和正交参考相共同祖先的高能结构，并建立了单斜基态和技术相关铁电相及其各自母结构之间的关系
AI.conclusion: 压力提供了一个简单而稳健的物理标准，用于在氧化铪多晶型中建立有意义的家族关系，解决了当前研究中缺乏物理依据的问题

title: How active field theories couple to external potentials
summary: We study the simplest terms that need to be included in active field theories to couple them to external potentials. To do so, we consider active Brownian particles and implement a systematic perturbative expansion in the particle persistence time. The result is a non-trivial coupling between density and potential gradients, which accounts for the nonequilibrium features of active particles in the presence of an external potential, from boundary accumulation to far-field density modulation. We show how the method can be applied to particles interacting via pairwise forces and to spatial modulations of the propulsion speed.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了活性场论中耦合外部势能所需的最简单项，通过活性布朗粒子的系统微扰展开，发现了密度与势能梯度之间的非平凡耦合，解释了活性粒子在外部势能下的非平衡特征。
AI.motivation: 研究活性场论中如何正确耦合外部势能，以描述活性粒子在外部势能下的非平衡行为，如边界积累和远场密度调制等现象。
AI.method: 采用活性布朗粒子模型，在粒子持续时间内进行系统微扰展开，推导出活性场论中耦合外部势能所需的最简单项。
AI.result: 发现了密度与势能梯度之间的非平凡耦合项，该耦合能够解释活性粒子在外部势能下的各种非平衡特征，包括边界积累和远场密度调制。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可以推广到具有成对相互作用的粒子以及推进速度空间调制的情况，为活性系统在外部势能下的理论研究提供了系统框架。

title: A Density-Based Continuous Local Symmetry Measure
summary: Although continuous symmetry theory has attracted increasing attention in modern chemistry, local symmetry remains under-investigated. As a consequence, the relationship between symmetry and chemical behavior is often obscured, limiting the practical use of fuzzy symmetry measures. In this study, we introduce a novel framework for evaluating local symmetry based on electron density localization, and present continuous symmetry representations for several representative molecules. Our approach not only quantitatively captures global symmetry, but also reveals distinctive features of symmetry in a local chemical environment. The related concept, local chirality or chirotopicity, is also discussed. Overall, the proposed local symmetry and chirality measures provide valuable insights into molecular structure and structure-property relationships.

AI.tldr: 提出基于电子密度局域化的局部对称性评估新框架，可定量捕捉全局对称性并揭示局部化学环境中的对称性特征，同时讨论了局部手性概念。
AI.motivation: 连续对称性理论在现代化学中日益受到关注，但局部对称性研究不足，导致对称性与化学行为之间的关系模糊，限制了模糊对称性度量的实际应用。
AI.method: 引入基于电子密度局域化的局部对称性评估新框架，为多个代表性分子提供连续对称性表示。
AI.result: 该方法不仅能定量捕捉全局对称性，还能揭示局部化学环境中的独特对称性特征，同时讨论了局部手性（手性拓扑性）相关概念。
AI.conclusion: 提出的局部对称性和手性度量方法为分子结构及结构-性质关系提供了有价值的见解。

title: Solitary waves in a phononic integrated circuit
comment: Main text: 8 pages + 5 figures. Supplementary: 23 pages + 15 figures + 2 tables
summary: Solitons are universal nonlinear excitations that appear in settings as varied as optics, water waves, and quantum gases [1-5]. While reduced models of soliton dynamics are well established, their validity and dynamical behaviour in strongly nonlinear regimes with frequent interactions remain largely unexplored experimentally. Progress has been constrained by the difficulty of simultaneously achieving precise control of dispersion and nonlinearity, together with the temporal and spatial resolution required for dynamical observations. Here we overcome these difficulties by producing acoustic solitons in integrated phononic waveguides. We exploit the interplay between waveguide dispersion and mechanical Kerr nonlinearity to generate 'dark' solitons that persist over metre-scale propagation distances. The slow phonon velocity allows direct imaging of hundreds of dark soliton collisions -- two orders of magnitude more than have previously been accessible [6, 7] -- as well as soliton fission and the melting of a soliton Wigner crystal. Furthermore, the unprecedented dynamical resolution allows us to verify two long-predicted aspects of dark soliton behaviour: the existence of a collisional phase shift and two depth-dependent collision regimes [8, 9]. These results not only illuminate fundamental nonlinear energy transport processes, but also show a path towards acoustic versions of soliton-enabled technologies such as frequency combs and mode-locked lasers [1, 2, 10].

AI.tldr: 该研究在集成声子波导中产生声学暗孤子，实现了米级传播距离，并首次直接观测到数百次暗孤子碰撞，验证了长期预测的碰撞相移和两种深度依赖碰撞机制。
AI.motivation: 尽管孤子动力学简化模型已建立，但在强非线性、频繁相互作用区域的有效性和动力学行为仍缺乏实验探索。主要障碍在于难以同时实现色散和非线性的精确控制，以及观测所需的时间和空间分辨率。
AI.method: 利用集成声子波导，通过波导色散和机械Kerr非线性相互作用产生声学暗孤子。慢声子速度允许直接成像数百次暗孤子碰撞，以及孤子裂变和孤子维格纳晶体熔化过程。
AI.result: 实现了米级传播距离的声学暗孤子，观测到比以往多两个数量级的暗孤子碰撞（数百次）。首次实验验证了暗孤子碰撞相移和两种深度依赖碰撞机制。还观测到孤子裂变和孤子维格纳晶体熔化现象。
AI.conclusion: 该研究不仅阐明了基本的非线性能量传输过程，还为声学版本的孤子技术（如频率梳和锁模激光器）开辟了道路，展示了集成声子波导在探索强非线性孤子动力学方面的独特优势。

title: Triplet superconductivity supported by an X$_9$ high-order Van Hove singularity
comment: 14 pages, 4 figures. Version accepted by Physical Review Research
summary: We study a four-fold symmetric dispersion relation of a quantum material, which exhibits a single high-order Van Hove singularity of X$_9$ type at the Fermi energy. First, we analyze in detail its form, type and density of states when the energy dispersion is in its canonical form. Subsequently, we study the possibility of a superconducting state when Hubbard repulsive interactions are taken into account. By solving the gap equation, it is shown that triplet state superconductivity with power-law dependence of the critical temperature T$_c$ on the interaction strength can be formed when a single singularity is present in the Brillouin zone. We discuss the effects of fluctuations and provide an upper bound of a possible superconducting critical temperature for the ruthenate Sr$_3$Ru$_2$O$_7$ which has been shown to exhibit this type of singularity.

AI.tldr: 研究具有X9型高阶范霍夫奇异点的量子材料，分析其色散关系、态密度，并探讨在哈伯德排斥相互作用下形成三重态超导的可能性。
AI.motivation: 研究具有特殊高阶范霍夫奇异点的量子材料，探索其在哈伯德排斥相互作用下可能出现的超导行为，特别是针对已知存在此类奇异点的Sr3Ru2O7材料。
AI.method: 首先分析四重对称色散关系的规范形式、类型和态密度；然后考虑哈伯德排斥相互作用，通过求解能隙方程研究超导态的形成。
AI.result: 当布里渊区存在单个奇异点时，可以形成三重态超导态，其临界温度Tc与相互作用强度呈幂律依赖关系；为Sr3Ru2O7提供了可能的超导临界温度上限。
AI.conclusion: 具有X9型高阶范霍夫奇异点的量子材料在哈伯德排斥相互作用下可以支持三重态超导，为理解Sr3Ru2O7等材料的超导行为提供了理论框架。

title: Wafer-to-Wafer Bonding: Part: I -- The Coupled Physics Problem and the 2D Finite Element Implementation
summary: Wafer-to-wafer (WxW) bonding is a key enabler for three-dimensional integration, including hybrid bonding for fine-pitch Cu-Cu interconnects. During bonding, wafer deformation and the air entrapped between the wafers interact through a strongly coupled, time-dependent fluid-structure interaction (FSI) that can produce non-intuitive bonding dynamics and process sensitivities. This paper develops a mathematically consistent reduced-order model for WxW bonding by deriving a Kirchhoff-Love plate equation for wafer bending from three-dimensional linear elasticity and coupling it to a Reynolds lubrication equation for the inter-wafer air film. The resulting nonlinear plate-Reynolds system is discretized and solved monolithically in the high-performance FEniCSx framework using a $C^0$ interior-penalty formulation for the fourth-order plate operator, standard continuous Galerkin discretization for the pressure field, implicit time integration, and a Newton solver with automatic differentiation. Simulations reproduce experimentally reported probe-displacement histories for multiple initial gaps and verify force equilibrium at the bond front, where the Reynolds pressure acts as an effective contact reaction. Parametric studies reveal nonlinear, and in some cases non-monotonic, sensitivities of bonding-front kinetics to the initial gap, air viscosity, and interfacial energy, providing actionable trends for process optimization.

AI.tldr: 开发了晶圆-晶圆键合的降阶模型，通过耦合板弯曲方程与润滑方程，模拟键合过程中的流体-结构相互作用，揭示非线性动力学特性。
AI.motivation: 晶圆-晶圆键合是三维集成的关键技术，但键合过程中的晶圆变形与夹层空气之间存在强耦合的流体-结构相互作用，导致非直观的键合动力学和工艺敏感性，需要建立数学模型来理解这些复杂现象。
AI.method: 从三维线性弹性理论推导出Kirchhoff-Love板方程描述晶圆弯曲，耦合Reynolds润滑方程描述晶圆间空气薄膜，形成非线性板-雷诺系统。使用FEniCSx框架进行离散化求解，采用C0内罚方法处理四阶板算子，标准连续Galerkin离散化压力场，隐式时间积分和自动微分的牛顿求解器。
AI.result: 模拟重现了多种初始间隙下的实验探针位移历史，验证了键合前沿的力平衡（雷诺压力作为有效接触反力）。参数研究揭示了键合前沿动力学对初始间隙、空气粘度和界面能的非线性（有时非单调）敏感性，为工艺优化提供了可操作的趋势。
AI.conclusion: 建立的降阶模型能够准确模拟晶圆-晶圆键合过程中的复杂流体-结构相互作用，揭示了工艺参数的非线性影响，为键合工艺优化提供了理论指导和设计工具。

title: Discovery of BKT correlations in the quantum kagome compound Cs$_2$Cu$_3$SnF$_{12}$
summary: We investigate the microscopic properties of the kagome compound Cs$_2$Cu$_3$SnF$_{12}$ using $^{63,65}$Cu nuclear quadrupolar resonance (NQR). Analysis of the local hyperfine fields below the Néel temperature $T_N = 20$ K indicates a spin structure consistent with $P2_1/n$ symmetry of negative vector chirality. Measurements of the spin-lattice relaxation rate $T_1 ^{-1}$ reveal signatures of a gapless ground state and two-dimensional Berezinskii-Kosterlitz-Thouless (BKT)-type correlations above $T_N$, extending over a broad temperature range of approximately 130 K in zero magnetic field. Within the same temperature range, the observed increase in the NQR linewidth is consistent with short-range chiral order recently identified by neutron scattering. Our results establish Cs$_2$Cu$_3$SnF$_{12}$ as a unique quantum kagome system exhibiting BKT behavior.

AI.tldr: 通过核四极共振研究Kagome化合物Cs₂Cu₃SnF₁₂，发现其具有无隙基态和二维BKT型关联，在零磁场下约130K温度范围内存在手性短程序。
AI.motivation: 研究Kagome晶格化合物的微观性质，特别是探索Cs₂Cu₃SnF₁₂中的量子自旋行为和关联效应，以理解其独特的量子特性。
AI.method: 使用⁶³,⁶⁵Cu核四极共振技术，分析低于尼尔温度时的局域超精细场，测量自旋-晶格弛豫率T₁⁻¹，并观察NQR线宽变化。
AI.result: 确定自旋结构与P2₁/n对称性一致，具有负矢量手性；发现无隙基态特征和二维BKT型关联，在零磁场下约130K温度范围内存在手性短程序。
AI.conclusion: Cs₂Cu₃SnF₁₂是一个独特的量子Kagome系统，表现出BKT行为，为研究二维量子自旋系统提供了重要平台。

title: Electrochemical and thermal control of continuous phase transitions in P2-NaxNi1/3Mn2/3O2
comment: Main text: 22 pages, 5 figures and SI: 32 pages, 15 figures
summary: Sodium layered oxides often undergo phase transformations involving ordering or disordering of Na+ upon desodiation, i.e., when cycled as a battery electrode. Accurately characterizing these phases is crucial for understanding functional properties, such as chemical diffusivity. In this work, we reveal that Na+-vacancy (dis)ordering in a layered oxide is intrinsically coupled to continuous symmetry-changing transformations of the host structure. We examine the low-symmetry orthorhombic unit cell of P2-NaxNi1/3Mn2/3O2 (NNM) using both neutron and X-ray diffraction. Specifically, special sodium stoichiometries (x = 2/3 and 1/2) exhibit concomitant Na+-vacancy ordering and an orthorhombic distortion from the parent hexagonal unit cell. We then demonstrate that electrochemical desodiation drives symmetry-changing transformations in NNM that are linked to Na+-vacancy (dis)ordering, with evidence of second-order behavior observed near x = 2/3. Variable-temperature synchrotron X-ray diffraction further clarifies the coupling between Na+-vacancy disordering and orthorhombic-to-hexagonal phase transitions in NNM. The temperature-driven phase transitions at both x = 2/3 and 1/2 are also consistent with a second-order mechanism. Our analysis of the phase transitions in NNM has fundamental consequences for sodium chemical diffusivity in the vicinity of the ordered phases. The insights from this work are directly applicable to other layered oxides that exhibit alkali-metal-vacancy ordering.

AI.tldr: 钠层状氧化物在脱钠过程中，钠离子空位的（无序）有序化与宿主结构的对称性变化存在本征耦合，这种相变机制对钠化学扩散性有重要影响。
AI.motivation: 钠层状氧化物在作为电池电极循环时，常发生钠离子有序/无序的相变，准确表征这些相变对于理解化学扩散性等功能特性至关重要。
AI.method: 使用中子和X射线衍射研究P2-NaxNi1/3Mn2/3O2的低对称性正交晶胞，通过电化学脱钠和变温同步辐射X射线衍射分析对称性变化与钠空位（无序）有序化的耦合关系。
AI.result: 在特定钠化学计量比（x=2/3和1/2）下观察到钠空位有序化与正交晶格畸变共存；电化学脱钠驱动与钠空位（无序）有序化相关的对称性变化，在x=2/3附近观察到二阶行为；变温实验进一步证实钠空位无序化与正交-六方相变的耦合。
AI.conclusion: 钠空位（无序）有序化与宿主结构对称性变化的本征耦合对钠化学扩散性有根本性影响，这一见解可直接应用于其他表现出碱金属空位有序化的层状氧化物。

title: The damage spreading transition: a hierarchy of renormalization group fixed points
summary: Deterministic classical cellular automata can be in two phases, depending on how irreversible the dynamical rules are. In the strongly irreversible phase, trajectories with different initial conditions coalesce quickly, while in the weakly irreversible phase, trajectories with different initial conditions can remain different for a time exponential in the system volume. The transition between these phases is referred to as the damage-spreading transition (the "damaged" sites are those that differ between the trajectories). We develop a theory for this transition. In the simplest and most generic setting, the transition is known to be related to directed percolation, one of the best-studied nonequilibrium phase transitions. However, we show that full theory of the damage-spreading critical point is richer than directed percolation, and contains an infinite hierarchy of sectors of local observables. Directed percolation describes the first level of the hierarchy. The higher observables include "overlaps" for multiple trajectories, and may be labeled by set partitions. (These higher observables arise naturally if, for example, we consider decay of entropy under the irreversible dynamics.) The full hierarchy yields a hierarchy of nonequilibrium fixed points for reaction-diffusion-type processes, all of which contain directed percolation as a subsector, but which possess additional universal critical exponents. We analyze these higher fixed points using a field theory formulation and renormalization group arguments, and using simulations in 1+1 dimensions.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了确定性经典细胞自动机中的损伤传播相变，发现该相变比传统定向渗流理论更丰富，包含无限层次结构的局部可观测量，每个层次都有不同的普适临界指数。
AI.motivation: 研究确定性经典细胞自动机中损伤传播相变的完整理论框架。传统上认为这种相变与定向渗流相关，但作者发现实际理论比定向渗流更丰富，需要建立更全面的层次结构来描述所有局部可观测量。
AI.method: 1. 理论分析：建立损伤传播相变的完整层次理论，将局部可观测量按集合划分标记；2. 场论表述：采用场论框架和重整化群论证分析高阶不动点；3. 数值模拟：在1+1维度进行模拟验证理论预测。
AI.result: 发现损伤传播临界点包含无限层次结构的局部可观测量，定向渗流仅描述第一层次。高阶可观测量包括多轨迹的"重叠"，每个层次都有独特的普适临界指数。通过场论和模拟验证了这些高阶不动点的存在。
AI.conclusion: 确定性细胞自动机的损伤传播相变比传统定向渗流理论更复杂，包含无限层次结构的不动点，每个层次都有不同的临界行为。这为理解不可逆动力学中的相变提供了更全面的理论框架。

title: Molecular dynamics study of perchloric acid using the extended Madrid-2019 force field
summary: Perchloric acid (HClO$_4$) is widely used to prepare perchlorate salts with applications in propellants, industry, environmental chemistry, and biology. In this work, we used the intermolecular parameters from the extended Madrid-2019 force field for the perchlorate anion (ClO$_4^-$) and the oxonium cation (H$_3$O$^+$) together with TIP4P/2005 water to model perchloric acid solutions. The force field uses scaled charges of $\pm0.85e$ for monovalent ions and has been widely applied for aqueous ionic systems. We used the model to predict thermodynamic properties [densities and temperatures of maximum in density (TMD)], structural features (ion-water correlations: ion-hydrogen and ion-oxygen), and transport properties (self-diffusion coefficients and viscosity) of perchloric acid solutions at several concentrations. Experimental densities are predicted in excellent agreement up to 10 $m$. We also performed molecular simulations over a wide range of temperatures in order to determine the TMD of perchloric acid at different molalities. Predicted viscosities at 298.15 K and 1 bar are in good agreement with experimental data for concentrations below 4 $m$. Results are discussed in terms of model strengths and limitations.

AI.tldr: 使用扩展的Madrid-2019力场模拟高氯酸溶液，预测热力学、结构和输运性质，在特定浓度范围内与实验数据吻合良好。
AI.motivation: 高氯酸在推进剂、工业、环境化学和生物学中有广泛应用，需要准确模拟其水溶液性质以支持相关应用研究。
AI.method: 采用扩展的Madrid-2019力场，使用±0.85e的标度电荷模拟ClO₄⁻和H₃O⁺离子，结合TIP4P/2005水模型，通过分子模拟预测高氯酸溶液的热力学、结构和输运性质。
AI.result: 密度预测在10m浓度内与实验数据高度一致；粘度在298.15K和1bar条件下，浓度低于4m时与实验数据吻合良好；成功预测了不同浓度下的最大密度温度。
AI.conclusion: 该力场模型在特定浓度范围内能准确预测高氯酸溶液的性质，但存在浓度限制，需要进一步改进以扩展应用范围。

title: Charge Transport Modeling of CdSe/ZnS core/shell Quantum Nanorod Light-Emitting Diodes
summary: In this study, we investigate the electronic structure, charge transport dynamics, and optical properties of a quantum dot light-emitting diode (QD-LED) featuring a double nanorod (NR) emission layer composed of CdSe-ZnS core-shell structures. Utilizing a rigorous self-consistent numerical approach, we solve the coupled Schrodinger-Poisson equations iteratively to obtain accurate wave functions, energy levels, and potential profiles under varying external bias voltages. Detailed analyses reveal voltage-dependent electron localization dynamics, demonstrating a systematic transition of electrons between distinct NR regions via quantum tunneling. Charge density and electrostatic potential distributions are modeled comprehensively, employing the asymmetric Erlang distribution to characterize interface effects. By calculating current-voltage (I-V) characteristics and photoluminescence spectra, we demonstrate that external voltage serves as a robust tuning parameter for modulating emission energies and intensities, underscoring the potential of these NR-LED systems for tunable optoelectronic and photonic applications.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过自洽数值方法分析了具有CdSe-ZnS核壳双纳米棒发射层的量子点LED，揭示了电压调控的电子局域化动力学和量子隧穿效应，展示了其在可调谐光电子应用中的潜力。
AI.motivation: 研究双纳米棒结构量子点LED的电子结构、电荷传输动力学和光学特性，探索外部电压作为调控参数对器件性能的影响，为可调谐光电子器件开发提供理论基础。
AI.method: 采用自洽数值方法迭代求解耦合的薛定谔-泊松方程，获得波函数、能级和电势分布；使用非对称Erlang分布表征界面效应；计算电流-电压特性和光致发光光谱。
AI.result: 揭示了电压依赖的电子局域化动力学，展示了电子通过量子隧穿在不同纳米棒区域间的系统转移；外部电压可有效调控发射能量和强度，实现器件性能的可调谐性。
AI.conclusion: 双纳米棒LED系统具有通过外部电压调控电子传输和光学特性的能力，在可调谐光电子和光子学应用中展现出重要潜力，为新型光电器件设计提供了理论指导。

title: A mechanism for nonmonotonic $T_{c,max}(n)$ in multilayer cuprates
comment: 19 pages, 11 figures, 24 pages of technical appendices with 21 more figures
summary: We propose an explanation of the observed dependence of the maximal critical temperature $T_{c,max}$ on the number of conducting layers $n$ in layered copper-oxide superconductors within the preformed pair mechanism. Copper-oxygen planes fine-tune the lattice anisotropy and regulate the balance between the attractive and kinetic energies of carrier holes. To maximize the Bose-Einstein condensation temperature, real-space pairs must be compact and light at the same time. Generally, $T_{c,max}$ increases between $n = 1$ and $n = 3$ because pairs become lighter. For $n > 3$, the rising kinetic energy weakens the pairs, leading to inflated pair volumes and reduced $T_{c,max}$. By varying model parameters, the peak of $T_{c,max}(n)$ can be tuned to $n = 2$, $n = 3$, or $n > 3$. We also discuss strategies for using this knowledge to boost $T_{c,max}$ beyond the current record of 138 K.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种解释层状铜氧化物超导体中最大临界温度Tc_max与导电层数n依赖关系的预形成对机制，认为铜氧平面通过调节晶格各向异性来平衡载流子空穴的吸引能和动能，从而优化Tc_max。
AI.motivation: 解释实验观测到的层状铜氧化物超导体中最大临界温度Tc_max与导电层数n的依赖关系，特别是为什么Tc_max在n=1到n=3之间增加，而在n>3时下降，并探索如何利用这一知识将Tc_max提升到目前138K记录以上。
AI.method: 采用预形成对机制，分析铜氧平面如何精细调节晶格各向异性，平衡载流子空穴的吸引能和动能。通过改变模型参数，研究Tc_max(n)峰值位置的变化规律。
AI.result: Tc_max在n=1到n=3之间增加是因为预形成对变得更轻，有利于提高玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚温度；当n>3时，动能上升导致对变弱，对体积膨胀，Tc_max下降。通过调节模型参数，Tc_max(n)的峰值可以出现在n=2、n=3或n>3处。
AI.conclusion: 层状铜氧化物超导体中Tc_max与导电层数n的依赖关系可以通过预形成对机制得到解释，其中铜氧平面通过调节晶格各向异性来平衡吸引能和动能。这一理解为设计更高Tc_max的超导体提供了理论指导，有望突破目前的138K记录。

title: Screened second-order exchange in the uniform electron gas: exact reduction, a single-pole reference model and asymptotic analysis
summary: We derive an exact reduction of the screened second-order exchange (SOSEX) energy in the uniform electron gas to a triple integral for a specific class of single-pole screened interaction. The reduction proceeds by rescaling the frequency variable to factorize the propagator denominators, applying a Fourier decomposition to separate the two particle-hole blocks, and finally performing a change of integration variables that brings the geometric structure into a tractable form. The reduction to a one-variable integral kernel is possible if and only if the screened interaction belongs to a one-pole class characterized by a single momentum-independent frequency scale~$μ$, which we call the reduction-compatible single-pole (RC-SP) model. The RC-SP model does not approximate plasmon dispersions in real materials, but provides an exactly reducible reference model for analyzing dynamically screened exchange, and gives natural basis elements for approximating more general one-pole screening. We analyze the $μ$-dependence of the SOSEX energy asymptotically at both small and large~$μ$ and establish the leading behaviors at the theorem level. Under a power-law mapping from~$μ$ to the density parameter~$r_s$, this asymptotic structure constrains the analytic form of the screened-exchange correction in $r_s$-space, providing a diagrammatically justified basis for beyond-RPA functional construction. Direct numerical integration of the reduced representation confirms the asymptotic behaviors quantitatively.

AI.tldr: 本文推导了均匀电子气中屏蔽二阶交换(SOSEX)能量对于特定单极点屏蔽相互作用类的精确约化，将其简化为三重积分，并建立了约化兼容单极点(RC-SP)模型。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是建立精确可约化的参考模型来分析动态屏蔽交换，为超越随机相位近似(RPA)泛函构造提供图论基础。当前缺乏对动态屏蔽交换的精确可处理模型，特别是对于SOSEX能量的解析处理。
AI.method: 通过重新标度频率变量以因子化传播子分母，应用傅里叶分解分离两个粒子-空穴块，最后进行积分变量变换使几何结构可处理。约化到单变量积分核的条件是屏蔽相互作用属于单极点类，即约化兼容单极点(RC-SP)模型。
AI.result: 成功将SOSEX能量约化为三重积分，建立了RC-SP模型，分析了μ在小和大值时的渐近行为，并通过数值积分验证了渐近行为。该模型为r_s空间中屏蔽交换修正的解析形式提供了约束。
AI.conclusion: RC-SP模型虽然不近似真实材料的等离子体色散，但为分析动态屏蔽交换提供了精确可约化的参考模型，并为近似更一般的单极点屏蔽提供了自然基元，为超越RPA泛函构造奠定了图论基础。

title: Dimensionality-Dependent Exciton Dispersion in a Single-Band Mott Insulator
summary: Excitonic band structure is critical for investigating exciton dynamics. Theoretically, quantum effects from exchange scattering between electron-hole pairs significantly modulate exciton dispersion. Here, we report the direct observation of dimensionality-dependent exciton dispersion in a single-band Mott insulator Nb3Cl8 through high-resolution electron energy loss spectroscopy. In the high-temperature phase, the exciton in Nb3Cl8 hosts an exceptionally large binding energy, and exhibits clear quasi-two-dimensional massless linear dispersion. In contrast, in the low-temperature phase, the exciton splits into two bands, both displaying three-dimensional parabolic dispersion. These dramatic changes in the exciton dispersion stem from the dimensional mutation driven by a substantial enhancement of interlayer coupling across the phase transition. This Letter provides a clear and typical example of how exciton behavior evolves with dimensionality.

AI.tldr: 通过高分辨率电子能量损失谱直接观测到单带Mott绝缘体Nb3Cl8中维度依赖的激子色散，发现高温相中激子呈现准二维无质量线性色散，低温相中激子分裂为两个三维抛物线色散带。
AI.motivation: 激子能带结构对研究激子动力学至关重要，理论上电子-空穴对之间的交换散射量子效应会显著调制激子色散，但需要实验验证维度对激子行为的影响。
AI.method: 使用高分辨率电子能量损失光谱技术直接观测单带Mott绝缘体Nb3Cl8中的激子色散，比较高温相和低温相的激子行为差异。
AI.result: 在高温相中，Nb3Cl8的激子具有异常大的结合能，并表现出清晰的准二维无质量线性色散；在低温相中，激子分裂为两个能带，均显示三维抛物线色散。
AI.conclusion: 激子色散的剧烈变化源于相变过程中层间耦合显著增强驱动的维度突变，这为激子行为如何随维度演化提供了清晰而典型的实例。

title: Chirality Cannot Be Ferroic in Enantiomorphic Space-Groups
summary: With growing interest in structural chirality in periodic solids, it has been suggested that chirality might constitute a new ferroic order parameter. In this work, we demonstrate, by means of a formal group-theoretical proof and a systematic group-subgroup analysis, that achiral-to-chiral transitions that produce either member of an enantiomorphic pair cannot be driven by a Brillouin-zone-center ($Γ$-point) instability from a common achiral parent. We further substantiate this result by explicitly showing that none of the achiral parent space groups that admit symmetry-chiral phonon eigenvectors host them at the zone center. Given that a primary ferroic order parameter must, among other requirements, transform according to a zone-center irreducible representation, we conclude that phase transitions leading to enantiomorphic space groups cannot be classified as primary ferroic transitions. This predicts that any critical enhancement of fluctuations must occur at finite-$q$ rather than as a divergence of a uniform macroscopic susceptibility.

AI.tldr: 手性不能作为一级铁性序参数，因为从非手性母相到手性相的相变不能由布里渊区中心（Γ点）的不稳定性驱动。
AI.motivation: 随着对周期性固体中结构手性兴趣的增长，有人提出手性可能构成一种新的铁性序参数。本文旨在通过形式化的群论证明和系统性的群-子群分析，检验手性是否满足作为一级铁性序参数的条件。
AI.method: 1. 使用形式化的群论证明方法；2. 进行系统的群-子群分析；3. 明确展示所有允许对称手性声子本征矢的非手性母相空间群在区中心都不存在这种本征矢。
AI.result: 1. 证明从非手性母相到手性对映体对的任一成员的相变不能由布里渊区中心（Γ点）的不稳定性驱动；2. 所有允许对称手性声子本征矢的非手性母相空间群在区中心都不存在这种本征矢；3. 因此手性相变不能归类为一级铁性相变。
AI.conclusion: 手性不能作为一级铁性序参数，因为一级铁性序参数必须满足在区中心不可约表示下变换的条件。这预测任何临界增强的涨落必须发生在有限q处，而不是作为均匀宏观磁化率的发散。

title: Geometric Thermodynamics of Cycles: Curvature and Local Thermodynamic Response
summary: Classical thermodynamics contains familiar geometric relations associated with cyclic processes, most notably the identification of mechanical work with the area enclosed by a trajectory in the $(P,V)$ plane. We show that the area laws for work and reversible heat arise as projections of a single canonical two--form defined on the equilibrium thermodynamic manifold, providing a unified description of thermodynamic cycles in both the $(P,V)$ and $(T,S)$ representations. The same structure yields a direct link between cycle geometry and thermodynamic response: the work generated by infinitesimal cycles is set locally by the mixed curvature $U_{SV}$ of the equilibrium energy surface, which can be expressed in terms of measurable susceptibilities. This identifies thermodynamic work as a local geometric field over state space rather than solely a global property of cyclic processes. More broadly, the framework connects classical cycle geometry to stochastic thermodynamic trajectories, providing a geometric interpretation of nonequilibrium work relations such as the Jarzynski equality.

AI.tldr: 该论文将经典热力学中的循环过程几何关系统一为平衡热力学流形上的规范二形式投影，建立了循环几何与热力学响应之间的直接联系，并将经典循环几何与随机热力学轨迹连接起来。
AI.motivation: 经典热力学中，机械功通常被识别为(P,V)平面中轨迹所围成的面积，但缺乏统一的几何框架来描述不同表示（如(P,V)和(T,S)）中的热力学循环。作者旨在建立更基础的几何结构来统一描述热力学循环，并连接循环几何与热力学响应特性。
AI.method: 作者在平衡热力学流形上定义了一个规范二形式（canonical two-form），证明功和可逆热量的面积定律都是该二形式在不同表示下的投影。通过该几何结构，建立了循环几何与热力学响应之间的联系，特别是将微小循环产生的功与平衡能量曲面的混合曲率U_SV联系起来。
AI.result: 1. 功和可逆热量的面积定律统一为单一几何结构的投影；2. 微小循环产生的功由平衡能量曲面的局部混合曲率决定，该曲率可用可测量的响应函数表示；3. 热力学功被识别为状态空间上的局部几何场，而不仅仅是循环过程的全局性质；4. 该框架将经典循环几何与随机热力学轨迹连接，为Jarzynski等式等非平衡功关系提供了几何解释。
AI.conclusion: 该研究建立了热力学循环的统一几何框架，揭示了热力学功的局部几何本质，并成功连接了经典热力学与随机热力学，为理解热力学过程提供了新的几何视角。

title: Radial Gausslets
summary: Gausslets are one of the few examples of basis sets for electronic structure which allow for two-index/diagonal electron-electron interaction terms. A weakness of gausslets is that, because of their 1D origin, they have been tied to Cartesian coordinates. Here we generalize the gausslet construction for the radial coordinate in three dimensions for atomic basis sets. These radial gausslets make a very compact radial basis with a relatively modest number of functions, with diagonal interaction terms. We illustrate the accuracy of this construction with Hartree--Fock and exact diagonalization on atomic systems.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种用于原子系统的径向高斯基函数，将原有的一维高斯基推广到三维径向坐标，实现了紧凑的径向基组和两电子相互作用项的对角化。
AI.motivation: 传统高斯基函数（gausslets）虽然具有两电子相互作用项对角化的优点，但由于其一维起源，一直局限于笛卡尔坐标系。需要将其推广到三维径向坐标，以构建适用于原子系统的径向基组。
AI.method: 将高斯基函数的构造方法推广到三维径向坐标，构建径向高斯基函数。这种基组能够用相对较少的函数形成紧凑的径向基，同时保持两电子相互作用项的对角化特性。
AI.result: 通过Hartree-Fock方法和精确对角化在原子系统上测试，验证了径向高斯基函数的准确性。结果表明该基组能够有效描述原子系统的电子结构。
AI.conclusion: 成功将高斯基函数推广到三维径向坐标，构建了适用于原子系统的径向高斯基组，实现了紧凑的径向基表示和两电子相互作用项的对角化，为原子电子结构计算提供了新的基组选择。

title: Exploring Spectral Singularities in Dirac Semimetals: The Role of Non-Hermitian Physics and Dichroism
comment: 21 pages, 9 figures, 4 table, accepted for publication in Proceedings of the Royal Society A
summary: In this study, motivated by recent advancements in non-Hermitian physics, we explore new characteristics of Dirac semimetals (DSMs) using the spectral singularities by means of scattering techniques, with the goal of uncovering additional unique properties. To achieve this, we investigate how the axion texture of a DSM affects its topological properties by analyzing its interaction with electromagnetic waves. We examine the transverse electric (TE) mode configuration, where the magneto-electric effect induces a dichroic property in these materials. This behavior is particularly interesting and commonly seen in potential DSM candidates. Consequently, we report for the first time that a dichroic DSM generates 12 unique topological laser types. We discover that surface currents are generated by topological terms on the surface of the DSM slab. Furthermore, we examine how the θ term associated with axions in topological materials contributes to these topological properties. Our study reveals distinct topological role of the θ term more clearly than ever before. Our results confirm that the topological properties of DSMs with a single Dirac cone remain stable under external influences and that a topologically robust DSM laser can be developed accordingly

AI.tldr: 该研究利用非厄米物理和散射技术探索狄拉克半金属的新特性，首次发现双色性狄拉克半金属能产生12种独特的拓扑激光类型，并揭示了轴子θ项在拓扑性质中的明确作用。
AI.motivation: 受非厄米物理最新进展的启发，研究者希望利用谱奇点和散射技术探索狄拉克半金属的新特性，特别是研究轴子纹理如何影响其拓扑性质，以及电磁波相互作用下的行为。
AI.method: 采用散射技术分析狄拉克半金属与电磁波的相互作用，重点研究横向电模式配置，其中磁电效应诱导材料的双色性。通过分析表面电流和轴子θ项的贡献来探索拓扑性质。
AI.result: 首次发现双色性狄拉克半金属能产生12种独特的拓扑激光类型。发现拓扑项在狄拉克半金属表面产生表面电流，并清晰揭示了轴子θ项在拓扑性质中的独特作用。确认单狄拉克锥狄拉克半金属的拓扑性质在外部影响下保持稳定。
AI.conclusion: 研究证实了狄拉克半金属拓扑性质的稳定性，并表明可以据此开发拓扑鲁棒的狄拉克半金属激光器。轴子θ项在拓扑性质中扮演着比以往更清晰的角色，为拓扑激光器设计提供了新途径。

title: Correlation-driven enhancement of pairing in a nematic Hund's metal
comment: Main text: 8 pages, 6 figures. We include here supplemental material containing model and calculations details and additional numerical results
summary: Superconductivity and nematicity coexist in the phase diagram of many correlated systems, including iron-based superconductors. We investigate how Hund-driven correlations reshape boson-mediated superconductivity in a multiorbital nematic metal. We find that dynamical correlation effects beyond a quasiparticle-only description are essential to capture the robustness of superconductivity in the Hund regime. In the nematic phase, Hund correlations simultaneously enhance the orbital differentiation of the superconducting gaps and inhibit the most extreme nematic-driven orbital polarization and coherence collapse that would otherwise suppress pairing at strong coupling. A controlled cutoff analysis reveals a nontrivial, orbital-dependent buildup of the gaps, indicating that different frequency windows of the correlated spectrum contribute unevenly to pairing in the nematic Hund regime. This implies that pairing mechanisms with different characteristic boson energies can lead to distinct gap structures and trends.

AI.tldr: 研究揭示了在铁基超导体等多轨道向列金属中，Hund耦合驱动的关联效应如何重塑玻色子介导的超导性，发现Hund关联增强超导能隙的轨道分化，同时抑制向列相驱动的极端轨道极化和相干性崩溃。
AI.motivation: 超导性和向列性在许多关联系统中共存，包括铁基超导体。研究旨在理解Hund驱动的关联效应如何在多轨道向列金属中影响玻色子介导的超导性，特别是超越准粒子描述的动态关联效应的重要性。
AI.method: 采用多轨道向列金属模型，研究Hund关联对超导性的影响。使用受控截断分析揭示能隙的轨道依赖性积累，分析不同频率窗口对配对的贡献。
AI.result: 发现Hund关联在向列相中同时增强超导能隙的轨道分化，并抑制最极端的向列驱动轨道极化和相干性崩溃，从而在强耦合下保持配对的稳定性。不同频率窗口对配对的贡献不均匀，表明具有不同特征玻色子能量的配对机制会导致不同的能隙结构和趋势。
AI.conclusion: Hund驱动的关联效应对于理解多轨道向列金属中超导性的鲁棒性至关重要。动态关联效应超越了准粒子描述，揭示了能隙的轨道依赖性积累模式，为理解不同配对机制对超导性质的影响提供了新视角。

title: Symmetric Mass Generation Transition and its Nonequilibrium Critical Dynamics in a Bilayer Honeycomb Lattice Model
summary: Symmetric mass generation (SMG) transitions defy the conventional Landau-Ginzburg-Wilson paradigm by opening a many-body gap without spontaneous symmetry breaking or topological order, attracting intense interest across particle physics and condensed matter physics. Here, we utilize unbiased quantum Monte Carlo simulations to investigate the equilibrium and nonequilibrium critical dynamics of the SMG transition in a bilayer honeycomb lattice model. We unambiguously confirm the existence of an SMG transition at $J_{\text{c}}=2.584(8)$ that separates the Dirac semimetal phase from a symmetry-preserving SMG phase. High-precision extraction of the critical exponents reveals a novel universality class that profoundly departs from mean-field theory. We then extend our study to the nonequilibrium regime, exploring the driven dynamics of the SMG transition. Notably, despite the breakdown of the prerequisites for the celebrated Kibble-Zurek mechanism, the nonequilibrium SMG transition still follows the generalized finite-time scaling. By bridging equilibrium criticality and nonequilibrium dynamics, our work uncovers the universal critical properties of SMG transitions, providing a solid theoretical basis for future experimental studies of SMG physics.

AI.tldr: 通过量子蒙特卡洛模拟研究双层蜂窝晶格模型中对称质量生成(SMG)相变的平衡与非平衡临界动力学，发现新的普适类并验证非平衡SMG相变仍遵循广义有限时间标度。
AI.motivation: 对称质量生成(SMG)相变打破了传统的朗道-金兹堡-威尔逊范式，在不破坏对称性或产生拓扑序的情况下打开多体能隙，在粒子物理和凝聚态物理领域引起广泛关注。研究SMG相变的临界性质对于理解这一非常规相变机制至关重要。
AI.method: 采用无偏量子蒙特卡洛模拟研究双层蜂窝晶格模型中的SMG相变。通过高精度提取临界指数分析平衡临界性质，并扩展到非平衡区域研究驱动动力学，检验广义有限时间标度在SMG相变中的适用性。
AI.result: 1. 确认在J_c=2.584(8)处存在SMG相变，分离狄拉克半金属相和对称保持的SMG相；2. 临界指数揭示了一个显著偏离平均场理论的新普适类；3. 尽管Kibble-Zurek机制的前提条件被破坏，非平衡SMG相变仍遵循广义有限时间标度。
AI.conclusion: 该工作通过连接平衡临界性和非平衡动力学，揭示了SMG相变的普适临界性质，为未来SMG物理的实验研究提供了坚实的理论基础。

title: AI-supported Degradation Study of Carbon-based Perovskite Solar Cells: Learning the Device Physics of Perovskite Solar Cells: A Drift-Diffusion Guided Autoencoder Approach
summary: Carbon-electrode-based PSC devices are stressed under 1 Sun equivalent illumination in a stability setup, and different scan-speed dependent current-voltage (J-V) curves are measured during aging. The collected data is used to estimate several physical parameters that contain information about charge transport and recombination using Machine Learning (ML), which allows for in situ tracking of possible signs of degradation. These results are compared to what can be classically interpreted by analysing changes in J-V curves, and the evolution of the predicted parameters is studied. The predictions are then used to simulate a digital twin of the measured devices, and their physical implications and the differences between measurements and devices are discussed.

AI.tldr: 使用机器学习分析钙钛矿太阳能电池在光照老化过程中的电流-电压曲线，预测物理参数变化，建立数字孪生模型来追踪降解迹象
AI.motivation: 传统J-V曲线分析难以实时追踪钙钛矿太阳能电池的降解过程，需要开发基于机器学习的原位监测方法来预测物理参数变化，实现早期降解检测
AI.method: 在1太阳当量光照下对碳电极钙钛矿太阳能电池进行老化测试，测量不同扫描速度的J-V曲线，使用机器学习从数据中估计电荷传输和复合相关的物理参数
AI.result: 机器学习能够从J-V曲线中预测物理参数变化，比传统分析方法更早检测到降解迹象，建立的数字孪生模型能够模拟实际器件行为并揭示测量与器件之间的差异
AI.conclusion: 机器学习方法为钙钛矿太阳能电池的原位降解监测提供了有效工具，能够预测物理参数变化并建立数字孪生模型，有助于理解降解机制和改善器件稳定性

title: Pseudospectral phenomena and the origin of the non-Hermitian skin effect
summary: The non-Hermitian skin effect (NHSE), characterized by a macroscopic accumulation of eigenstates at the edge of a system with open boundaries, is often ascribed to a non-trivial point-gap topology of the Bloch Hamiltonian. We revisit this connection and show that the eigenspectrum of non-normal operators is highly sensitive to boundary conditions and generic perturbations, and therefore does not constitute a stable object encoding topological information. Instead, topological properties are reflected in the singular-value spectrum of finite systems and, in the semi-infinite limit, correspond to boundary-localized eigenmodes implied by the index of the corresponding Toeplitz operator. For a Hatano-Nelson ladder, where point-gap winding and non-normality can be varied independently, we demonstrate that the NHSE can occur without point-gap winding and, conversely, that point-gap winding can persist without the NHSE. These results establish that the NHSE originates from spectral instability and non-reciprocity rather than topology, and that the commonly assumed relation between spectral winding and boundary localization relies on translational invariance and is therefore not generic.

AI.tldr: 非厄米趋肤效应(NHSE)并非源于点隙拓扑，而是来自谱不稳定性和非互易性；点隙缠绕与边界局域化之间的常用关系并非普适。
AI.motivation: 重新审视非厄米趋肤效应(NHSE)与点隙拓扑之间的传统联系，指出特征谱对边界条件和扰动的敏感性使其不适合编码拓扑信息。
AI.method: 通过分析非正规算子的特征谱稳定性，提出拓扑性质应反映在有限系统的奇异值谱中；使用Hatano-Nelson梯子模型独立变化点隙缠绕和非正规性，验证NHSE与点隙拓扑的分离。
AI.result: 证明NHSE可以在没有点隙缠绕的情况下发生，反之点隙缠绕也可以在没有NHSE的情况下持续存在；表明谱缠绕与边界局域化的关系依赖于平移对称性，并非普适。
AI.conclusion: 非厄米趋肤效应源于谱不稳定性和非互易性而非拓扑性质，传统认为的谱缠绕与边界局域化关系在非平移不变系统中不成立。

title: Ab Initio Simulation of Femtosecond Time-Resolved Multi-Pulse Spectroscopies applied to the Heptazine$\cdots$H$_2$O Complex
summary: In multi-dimensional time-resolved spectroscopic experiments, multiple (more than two) short laser pulses with variable pulse delay times are employed for the time-resolved exploration of the photoinduced dynamics of molecular chromophores. In the present work, the quasi-classical doorway-window (DW) methodology recently developed for transient absorption pump-probe (PP) spectroscopy [M. F. Gelin et al., J. Chem. Theory Comput. 2021, 17, 2394] has been generalized to multi-pulse spectroscopies. Pump-push-probe (PPP) spectroscopy (involving three laser pulses) and pump-induced two-dimensional (P-2D) spectroscopy (involving five laser pulses) are considered as specific examples. The quasi-classical DW approximation results in conceptually simple and computationally efficient simulation protocols which are suitable for implementation with $ab$ $initio$ on-the-fly electronic-structure calculations. Simulations of PPP and P-2D spectra performed for the hydrogen-bonded heptazine$\cdots$H$_2$O complex illustrate that pump-stimulated experiments provide much richer information on the ultrafast radiationless relaxation dynamics of the excited electronic states of the heptazine$\cdots$H$_2$O complex than conventional PP and 2D experiments.

AI.tldr: 将准经典门-窗方法从瞬态吸收泵浦-探测光谱推广到多脉冲光谱，应用于泵浦-推-探测和泵浦诱导二维光谱，为七嗪-水复合物提供更丰富的激发态弛豫动力学信息。
AI.motivation: 传统泵浦-探测和二维光谱在探测分子发色团光诱导动力学方面存在信息限制，需要发展适用于多脉冲光谱的准经典计算方法，以获得更丰富的超快辐射弛豫动力学信息。
AI.method: 将准经典门-窗方法从瞬态吸收泵浦-探测光谱推广到多脉冲光谱，具体应用于泵浦-推-探测（三脉冲）和泵浦诱导二维光谱（五脉冲），建立概念简单、计算高效的模拟协议，可与从头算实时电子结构计算结合。
AI.result: 对氢键七嗪-水复合物的模拟表明，泵浦-推-探测和泵浦诱导二维光谱比传统泵浦-探测和二维光谱提供更丰富的超快辐射弛豫动力学信息，揭示了激发电子态的详细弛豫过程。
AI.conclusion: 准经典门-窗方法成功扩展到多脉冲光谱，为复杂分子系统的超快光诱导动力学研究提供了强大而高效的计算工具，特别适用于氢键复合物等体系的激发态弛豫过程分析。

title: Quantum correlations and dissipative blockade of polaritons in a tunable fiber cavity
summary: Cavity exciton--polaritons are quasiparticles that form when quantum well excitons hybridize with a cavity mode. Here, we carry out photon correlation measurements under continuous wave resonant laser excitation to demonstrate quantum correlations between cavity--polaritons. Our experiments reveal an unexpectedly strong dependence of polariton interactions on cavity--exciton detuning. When the polaritons are predominantly exciton-like, we observe a transition from photon antibunching to bunching as the laser is tuned across the polariton resonance, in agreement with a simple Kerr-nonlinearity model. When the lower-branch polariton energy is tuned to induce a two-polariton Feshbach resonance with the biexciton mode, the degree of polariton antibunching becomes independent of the laser detuning: we explain our finding by invoking a dissipative blockade mechanism arising from large biexciton broadening. Our experiments demonstrate that the strong polariton blockade regime would be achieved by reducing the polariton decay rate by a factor of 10.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过光子关联测量研究腔极化激元的量子关联特性，发现极化激元相互作用对腔-激子失谐有强烈依赖，并观察到从反聚束到聚束的转变，在双极化激元Feshbach共振时出现与激光失谐无关的反聚束现象。
AI.motivation: 研究腔极化激元（量子阱激子与腔模杂化形成的准粒子）的量子关联特性，探索极化激元相互作用对腔-激子失谐的依赖关系，以及双极化激元Feshbach共振对量子关联的影响。
AI.method: 采用连续波共振激光激发下的光子关联测量技术，研究腔极化激元的量子关联。通过调节腔-激子失谐，观察极化激元共振时的关联变化，并在双极化激元Feshbach共振条件下进行测量。
AI.result: 发现极化激元相互作用对腔-激子失谐有强烈依赖：当极化激元主要为激子特性时，激光调谐跨越极化激元共振时观察到从光子反聚束到聚束的转变；在双极化激元Feshbach共振条件下，极化激元反聚束程度与激光失谐无关，这归因于双激子展宽引起的耗散阻塞机制。
AI.conclusion: 实验表明通过将极化激元衰减率降低10倍即可实现强极化激元阻塞机制，这为量子信息处理和量子光学应用中的极化激元量子关联控制提供了重要见解。

title: Glassy magnetic freezing of interacting clusters in LK-99-family materials
summary: We report reproducible magnetization anomalies appearing below room temperature in copper-doped apatite materials belonging to the LK-99 family synthesized via hydrothermal methods. These anomalies are observed consistently across samples prepared under comparable conditions. Although the extracted Mydosh parameter lies within the range often associated with vortex-glass behavior in superconductors, a detailed analysis of DC magnetization, AC susceptibility, field dependence, and magnetic memory effects demonstrates that the observed phenomena are not related to superconductivity. Instead, the data are consistent with glassy magnetic freezing of interacting clusters. Compositional and structural analysis identifies covellite (CuS), an ubiquitous secondary phase in these intrinsically multiphase materials, as the primary origin of the observed behavior. Our results clarify the magnetic origin of LK-99-related anomalies and highlight the importance of phase complexity in interpreting apparent superconducting signatures in this materials family.

AI.tldr: 铜掺杂磷灰石材料中观察到可重复的磁化异常，但分析表明这些现象并非超导性，而是源于硫化铜（covellite）相引起的玻璃态磁性冻结。
AI.motivation: 研究LK-99家族材料中观察到的低温磁化异常现象，澄清这些异常是否与超导性相关，并确定其真实物理起源。
AI.method: 通过水热法合成铜掺杂磷灰石材料，使用直流磁化、交流磁化率、磁场依赖性和磁记忆效应等多种磁学测量技术进行详细分析，结合成分和结构分析确定相组成。
AI.result: 观察到可重复的磁化异常，Mydosh参数落在通常与超导体涡旋玻璃行为相关的范围内，但综合分析表明这些现象并非超导性，而是由普遍存在的硫化铜（covellite）次级相引起的相互作用团簇的玻璃态磁性冻结。
AI.conclusion: LK-99相关材料的磁化异常源于硫化铜相的玻璃态磁性行为，而非超导性。研究强调了相复杂性在解释这类材料中表观超导特征的重要性。

title: Profound impacts of interlayer interactions in bilayer altermagnetic V2S2O
summary: Two-dimensional altermagnets exhibit exceptional potential for low-power spintronics via nonrelativistic spin splitting and zero net magnetization. Here, we systematically investigate the influence of interlayer interactions on the electronic, magnetic and quantum transport properties of bilayer vanadium oxysulfide (V2S2O), a prototypical layered altermagnet, using DFT and NEGF calculations. Our results reveal that interlayer interactions predominantly modulate the p-orbital derived top valence bands, inducing a profound competitive valence band maximum position between Gamma-point pz and X/Y-point pxy orbitals, with an energy difference as small as 9 meV. Furthermore, interlayer interactions suppress the piezomagnetic effect and impose additional requirements on the type of strain for the bilayer system, compared to its monolayer counterpart. Out-of-plane external electric fields effectively weaken interlayer coupling by enlarging the energy difference of Gamma/X-Y top valence bands to 170 meV. Quantum transport simulations on a bilayer Au/V2S2O/Au two-probe device demonstrate the presence of pronounced spin current. Interlayer interactions reduce the transmission spin polarization from nearly 100% (monolayer) to 60% (bilayer) for energies above the Fermi level. Notably, gate-voltage modulation exhibits significant asymmetry in controlling charge-to-spin current conversion efficiency, originating from the out-of-plane symmetry breaking induced by the electrode geometry. Specifically, a positive gate voltage markedly enhances the contribution of the bottom layer to the overall spin polarization, while a negative gate voltage induces a marginal reduction of transmission spin polarization, attributed to the inherently weak polarization contribution of the bottom layer. These findings provide essential insights for the design and optimization of multilayer altermagnetic spintronics.

AI.tldr: 双层V2S2O交替磁体中，层间相互作用显著影响电子结构、压磁效应和自旋输运性质，特别是降低自旋极化率并引入栅压调控的不对称性。
AI.motivation: 研究二维交替磁体在多层结构中的层间相互作用如何影响其电子、磁性和量子输运性质，为多层交替磁体自旋电子学器件的设计和优化提供理论指导。
AI.method: 采用密度泛函理论（DFT）和非平衡格林函数（NEGF）计算，系统研究双层V2S2O的电子结构、磁性和量子输运特性，分析层间相互作用、应变、外电场和栅压的影响。
AI.result: 层间相互作用主要调制p轨道价带顶，引起Γ点pz和X/Y点pxy轨道竞争（能量差仅9meV）；抑制压磁效应；降低自旋极化率从单层近100%到双层60%；栅压调控呈现显著不对称性，正栅压增强底层贡献，负栅压影响较小。
AI.conclusion: 层间相互作用对多层交替磁体的电子结构和自旋输运有重要影响，栅压的不对称调控特性为优化多层交替磁体自旋电子学器件提供了关键设计思路。

title: Non-Hermitian skin effect in periodic, random, and quasiperiodic systems
summary: The non-Hermitian skin effect (NHSE), which drives bulk states toward system boundaries, modifies bulk-boundary correspondence and complicates the identification of topological edge modes. Although breaking translational symmetry is known to influence this behavior, a systematic comparison of different structural classes remains limited. Here we investigate periodic, random, and quasiperiodic (Fibonacci) systems using a one-dimensional non-Hermitian quantum walk model. By matching the local scattering parameters in a topologically nontrivial regime, we isolate the role of spatial structure in the presence of the NHSE. We find that periodic systems exhibit pronounced boundary accumulation of bulk states. Random systems suppress this accumulation through Anderson localization, but the topological gap becomes partially filled with localized in-gap states. In contrast, the Fibonacci quasiperiodic system suppresses large-scale boundary accumulation while maintaining a well-defined topological gap. Analysis of the wave functions suggests that the hierarchical quasiperiodic structure fragments bulk states across multiple length scales, thereby mitigating the NHSE. These results identify deterministic quasiperiodicity as a distinct structural regime for controlling non-Hermitian skin dynamics and isolating topological boundary modes.

AI.tldr: 研究比较了周期、随机和准周期（斐波那契）结构在非厄米趋肤效应下的表现，发现准周期结构能抑制边界积累同时保持拓扑间隙清晰
AI.motivation: 非厄米趋肤效应使体态向边界聚集，改变了体边对应关系，使得拓扑边缘模式的识别变得复杂。虽然已知打破平移对称性会影响这种行为，但不同结构类型的系统比较仍然有限
AI.method: 使用一维非厄米量子行走模型，在拓扑非平凡区域匹配局部散射参数，研究周期、随机和准周期（斐波那契）系统，分析空间结构在非厄米趋肤效应存在下的作用
AI.result: 周期系统表现出显著的体态边界积累；随机系统通过安德森局域化抑制这种积累，但拓扑间隙被局域化带内态部分填充；斐波那契准周期系统抑制了大尺度边界积累，同时保持了明确的拓扑间隙
AI.conclusion: 准周期结构通过分层结构将体态分散到多个长度尺度，从而缓解非厄米趋肤效应。确定性准周期性被确定为控制非厄米趋肤动力学和隔离拓扑边界模式的独特结构体系

title: LPC3D: An Enhanced Parallel Software for Large-Scale Simulation of Adsorption in Porous Carbons and Supercapacitors
summary: Simulations of electrochemical double layer capacitors based on porous carbon electrodes, energy storage systems which accumulate and release energy through reversible ion adsorption at electrode/electrolyte interfaces, are often performed at the microscopic scale, using molecular dynamics. Such simulations provide crucial information to understand the adsorption of ions and the effect of confinement on some electrochemical properties. However, their computational cost limits the size of the systems studied to a few nanometers and a few pores while experimental materials are highly heterogeneous with a distribution of particle and pore sizes. LPC3D is a software designed for mesoscopic simulations of porous carbon particles and carbon-based supercapacitors which allow for the inclusion of such heterogeneity. The code calculates quantities of adsorbed ions, diffusion coefficients and NMR spectra of ions / molecules adsorbed in porous carbon matrices. In this work, we report on a new implementation of LPC3D, written in Python using the PyStencils module which can generate optimized C++ and CUDA code. This implementation is parallel, can be run on CPU and GPU, and allows one to simulate systems going from a single carbon particle to a supercapacitor with hundreds of micrometers in length. Here, we apply the new implementation of LPC3D to the simulation of supercapacitors with porous carbon electrodes represented as monoliths or carbon films to investigate the influence of the microstructure on the resulting adsorption and spectroscopic properties.

AI.tldr: LPC3D软件的新Python实现，使用PyStencils生成优化的C++/CUDA代码，用于介观尺度多孔碳超级电容器模拟，可处理从单个碳颗粒到数百微米尺度的系统。
AI.motivation: 现有分子动力学模拟只能处理纳米尺度系统，而实验材料具有高度异质性（颗粒和孔径分布），需要能够模拟更大尺度异质系统的工具。
AI.method: 开发了LPC3D软件的新Python实现，利用PyStencils模块生成优化的C++和CUDA代码，支持CPU和GPU并行计算，可模拟从单个碳颗粒到数百微米尺度的超级电容器系统。
AI.result: 新实现能够模拟多孔碳电极作为整体或碳薄膜的超级电容器，研究微观结构对吸附和光谱性质的影响，计算吸附离子量、扩散系数和NMR光谱。
AI.conclusion: LPC3D的新实现填补了微观分子动力学模拟与实验尺度之间的鸿沟，为研究多孔碳超级电容器的异质性效应提供了有效的介观尺度模拟工具。

title: Genuine and spurious (non-)ergodicity in single particle tracking
summary: In single-particle tracking experiments measuring anomalous diffusion dynamics, understanding ergodicity is crucial, as it ensures that the time average of an observable matches the ensemble average, and can thus be fitted with known ensemble-averaged observables. A commonly used criterion for assessing the ergodicity of a stochastic process is based on the comparison of the mean-squared displacement (MSD) with the time-averaged MSD (TAMSD). This approach has been widely applied and proves effective in cases of weak ergodicity breaking across various systems in both theoretical and experimental studies. However, there is relatively little discussion regarding the theoretical justification and limitations of this definition. Here, we demonstrate that this widely accepted criterion to some extent contradicts the classical definition of ergodicity as well as physical intuition, leading to spurious (non-)ergodicity results when applied to several well-known stochastic models. To address this limitation, we propose using the mean-squared increment (MSI) instead of the MSD for comparison of ensemble- and time-averaged observables. Several well-established examples demonstrate that our MSI-TAMSD criterion not only effectively reveals weak ergodicity breaking, equivalent to the MSD-TAMSD approach, but also provides a more accurate characterization of the genuine (non-)ergodicity of systems where the MSD-TAMSD method fails. Additionally, for systems exhibiting "ultraweak" ergodicity breaking, the MSI can reveal the asymptotic stationarity and ergodic nature of the process' increments. Our findings emphasize the important role of the MSI observable for SPT experiments and anomalous diffusion studies.

AI.tldr: 该论文指出传统MSD-TAMSD准则在判断随机过程遍历性时存在缺陷，提出使用MSI-TAMSD新准则能更准确表征系统的真实(非)遍历性。
AI.motivation: 在单粒子追踪实验中，理解遍历性对分析异常扩散动力学至关重要。传统上使用MSD与TAMSD比较的方法被广泛采用，但其理论依据和局限性缺乏深入讨论，有时会得出错误的遍历性判断结果。
AI.method: 提出使用均方增量(MSI)替代均方位移(MSD)来比较系综平均和时间平均观测值。通过多个经典随机模型验证MSI-TAMSD准则的有效性。
AI.result: MSI-TAMSD准则不仅能有效揭示弱遍历性破缺（与MSD-TAMSD方法等效），还能更准确地表征MSD-TAMSD方法失效系统的真实(非)遍历性。对于"超弱"遍历性破缺系统，MSI能揭示增量过程的渐近平稳性和遍历性本质。
AI.conclusion: MSI观测值在单粒子追踪实验和异常扩散研究中具有重要作用，新提出的MSI-TAMSD准则为遍历性判断提供了更可靠的理论框架。

title: Vectorial Imaging of the Photodissociation of 2-Bromobutane Oriented via Hexapolar State Selection
summary: Molecular orientation techniques are becoming available in the study of elementary chemical processes, in order to highlight those structural and dynamical properties that would be concealed by random rotational motions. Recently successful orientation was achieved for asymmetric-top and chiral molecules of much larger complexity than hitherto. In this work, we report and discuss the correlation between the vectors photofragment recoil velocity v, transition dipole moment μ, and permanent dipole moment d in a dissociation experiment on hexapole oriented 2-bromobutane, photoinitiated by a linearly polarized laser. The sliced ion images of the Br* (2P1/2) and Br (2P3/2) photofragment were acquired at 234.0 and 254.1 nm, respectively, by (2+1) resonance-enhanced multiphoton ionization technique. A detailed analysis of the sliced ion images obtained at a tilting angle 45o of the laser polarization provides the information on correlation of the three vectors, which are confined by two polar angles α, \c{hi} and one azimuthal angle φμd in the recoil frame. The sliced ion images of Br fragments eliminated individually from the enantiomers at 254.1 nm yield the asymmetric factor close to zero; for this reason the photofragment angular distributions do not show significant differences. The elimination of Br* fragment at 234.0 nm is mainly correlated with a parallel transition, giving rise to a large anisotropy parameter of 1.85, and thus can be considered as a single state excitation. The resulting recoil frame angles are optimized to 163.8° and 164.1° for α and \c{hi}, respectively, whereas φμd approaches close to 0o for the best fit. Since in the present case, the three vectors have an only slight spatial arrangement, the photofragment angular distributions of the two enantiomers do not show appreciable differences...

AI.tldr: 该研究通过光解取向的2-溴丁烷分子，分析光解碎片的速度、跃迁偶极矩和永久偶极矩三个矢量间的空间关联，探究手性分子光解过程的取向效应。
AI.motivation: 随着分子取向技术的发展，可以研究更复杂不对称陀螺和手性分子的光解过程，揭示随机旋转运动所掩盖的结构和动力学特性。本研究旨在通过取向的2-溴丁烷分子，分析光解过程中三个关键矢量间的空间关联。
AI.method: 使用六极子取向的2-溴丁烷分子，通过线偏振激光引发光解。采用(2+1)共振增强多光子电离技术，在234.0 nm和254.1 nm波长下分别获取Br*和Br光解碎片的切片离子成像。通过分析激光偏振倾斜45°时获得的切片离子图像，确定速度、跃迁偶极矩和永久偶极矩三个矢量在反冲坐标系中的空间关联。
AI.result: 在254.1 nm波长下，从两个对映体消除的Br碎片切片离子图像显示不对称因子接近零，光解碎片角分布无显著差异。在234.0 nm波长下，Br*碎片的消除主要与平行跃迁相关，各向异性参数高达1.85，可视为单态激发。反冲坐标系角度优化为α=163.8°、χ=164.1°，φμd接近0°。由于三个矢量空间排列差异微小，两个对映体的光解碎片角分布无明显差异。
AI.conclusion: 通过取向的2-溴丁烷分子光解实验，成功分析了速度、跃迁偶极矩和永久偶极矩三个矢量间的空间关联。虽然两个对映体的光解碎片角分布无明显差异，但该方法为研究更复杂手性分子的取向相关光解过程提供了有效手段。

title: Pre-Patterned Superconducting Contacts for Clean Superconductor-Topological Material Interfaces Enabling Long-Range Josephson Coupling
summary: Phase-coherent superconducting proximity in topological materials requires clean superconductor-topological material (SC-TM) interfaces, yet conventional top-contact fabrication often degrades them through oxidation, polymer residue, and process-induced disorder. Here we introduce a pre-patterned superconducting bottom-contact architecture in which MoRe/Au electrodes are defined before van der Waals crystal transfer, thereby avoiding on-flake lithography after transfer. In WTe2- and Bi1.5Sb0.5Te1.7Se1.3-based Josephson junctions, this architecture yields systematically larger I_c R_N and longer-ranged coupling than conventional top contacts. Cross-sectional STEM/EDS reveals atomically abrupt, chemically well-separated interfaces. These results establish pre-patterned SC-TM contacts as a practical route to reproducible, micrometer-scale Josephson platforms in van der Waals topological materials.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种预图案化超导底部接触架构，通过在转移范德华晶体前先定义MoRe/Au电极，避免了传统顶部接触方法导致的界面退化问题，在WTe2和Bi1.5Sb0.5Te1.7Se1.3基约瑟夫森结中实现了更好的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统超导-拓扑材料（SC-TM）顶部接触制造方法存在界面氧化、聚合物残留和工艺诱导无序等问题，会降低界面质量，影响相位相干超导邻近效应。
AI.method: 采用预图案化超导底部接触架构：在转移范德华晶体前先在衬底上定义MoRe/Au电极，避免转移后对薄片进行光刻处理，从而保持界面清洁。
AI.result: 在WTe2和Bi1.5Sb0.5Te1.7Se1.3基约瑟夫森结中，该架构相比传统顶部接触方法，系统性地获得了更大的临界电流-正常电阻乘积（I_c R_N）和更长程的耦合。截面STEM/EDS分析显示界面具有原子级陡峭性和良好的化学分离。
AI.conclusion: 预图案化SC-TM接触为范德华拓扑材料中可重复、微米级约瑟夫森平台提供了一条实用途径，能够实现高质量的超导-拓扑材料界面。

title: A Zero-Bias Superconducting Voltage Amplifier Based on the Bipolar Thermoelectric Effect
summary: We introduce a zero-bias superconducting voltage amplifier that harvests energy from a thermal gradient by exploiting negative differential resistance (NDR) in an asymmetric tunnel junction. The device is based on an asymmetric superconductor-insulator-superconductor (SIS) junction with an energy-gap ratio of $Δ_1/Δ_2 = 0.5$, connected in series with a load resistor. Owing to the superconducting bipolar thermoelectric effect, the current-voltage characteristic of the junction exhibits a region of NDR, in which the net current flows opposite to the applied voltage. This mechanism enables voltage amplification in the absence of any external electrical bias, relying solely on the temperature difference between the electrodes ($T_H \simeq 1$ K, $T_B \simeq 20$ mK). Numerical simulations predict a voltage gain of 20 dB, a 1 dB compression point at an input amplitude of 2 $μ$V, and a total harmonic distortion below $-50$ dB. The input-referred noise is approximately 1 nV/$\sqrt{Hz}$, with an associated thermal load on the order of nanowatts. The frequency response is broadband from near DC, with a $-3$ dB cutoff around 180 MHz, set by the RC time constant of the junction. Using Al-, Al-Cu-, and AlO$_x$-based technologies, the amplifier is compatible with conventional superconducting circuit fabrication processes. These findings demonstrate that thermoelectric superconducting junctions can deliver bias-free voltage amplification from near DC up to about 200 MHz, making them promising candidates for transition-edge sensor readout, quantum circuit instrumentation, and low-frequency cryogenic signal processing.

AI.tldr: 提出一种零偏置超导电压放大器，利用非对称隧道结中的负微分电阻效应，通过热梯度获取能量实现电压放大，无需外部电偏置。
AI.motivation: 传统电压放大器需要外部偏置电源，增加了系统复杂性和功耗。本文旨在开发一种无需外部电偏置的电压放大器，利用热梯度作为能量来源，特别适用于低温量子电路和传感器读出等应用。
AI.method: 采用非对称超导体-绝缘体-超导体（SIS）结，能隙比为Δ₁/Δ₂=0.5，与负载电阻串联。利用超导双极热电效应，在结的电流-电压特性中产生负微分电阻区域，实现电压放大。通过数值模拟评估性能参数。
AI.result: 模拟预测电压增益20 dB，1 dB压缩点在2 μV输入幅度，总谐波失真低于-50 dB。输入参考噪声约1 nV/√Hz，热负载在纳瓦量级。频率响应从近直流到180 MHz（-3 dB截止频率）。兼容Al、Al-Cu、AlOₓ等常规超导电路工艺。
AI.conclusion: 热电超导结能够实现从近直流到约200 MHz的零偏置电压放大，在过渡边缘传感器读出、量子电路仪器化和低频低温信号处理方面具有应用前景。

title: Ultrafast electrically controlled magnetism in charge-order-induced ferroelectric altermagnet
summary: The altermagnetism with antiparallel spin alignment exhibits anisotropic spin splitting and may possess an insulating state with a high Neel temperature, while the charge-order-induced ferroelectricity has ultrafast electric polarization switching. Considering that altermagnetism requires breaking space inversion,, the physical foundation for exploring ultrafast electrically controlled magnetism in altermagnetic ferroelectric materials is thus established. In this Letter, based on symmetry analysis and first-principles electronic structure calculations, we predict that LiV$_2$F$_6$ is a material that simultaneously hosts altermagnetism and charge-order-induced ferroelectricity. Since both the altermagnetism and ferroelectricity originate from charge order, LiV$_2$F$_6$ should exhibit strong magnetoelectric coupling. Our calculations indeed demonstrate that electric polarization reversal can induce band spin-polarization switching in LiV$_2$F$_6$. Moreover, time-dependent density functional theory calculations show that the electric polarization reversal in LiV$_2$F$_6$ occurs in 15 femtoseconds. Consequently, ultrafast electrically controlled magnetism can be realized in LiV$_2$F$_6$. Given that LiV$_2$F$_6$ has already been experimentally synthesized, our work provides a promising material platform for achieving ultrafast electrically controlled magnetism, which might have significant implications for the design of future electronic devices.

AI.tldr: 预测LiV₂F₆同时具有交变磁性和电荷序诱导铁电性，可实现超快电控磁性
AI.motivation: 探索同时具有交变磁性和铁电性的材料，以实现超快电控磁性，为未来电子器件设计提供新平台
AI.method: 基于对称性分析和第一性原理电子结构计算，结合时间依赖密度泛函理论
AI.result: 预测LiV₂F₆同时具有交变磁性和电荷序诱导铁电性，电极化反转可在15飞秒内发生并诱导能带自旋极化切换
AI.conclusion: LiV₂F₆是实现超快电控磁性的有前景材料平台，对设计未来电子器件具有重要意义

title: Synergistic chemical and optical switching of chiral symmetry breaking in 1\textit{T}-TaS$_2
summary: Optical control of symmetry-breaking quantum phases is a central goal in quantum materials, yet deterministic switching is often hindered by the stability of single-domain ground states. The chiral structure of the charge density wave (CDW) in 1T-TaS$_2$ provides a natural platform for such control, but the pristine material remains locked in a single chirality. Here we show that combining chemical doping with femtosecond optical excitation enables efficient and non-thermal switching of the chiral CDW state and reveal its microscopic mechanism. Ti substitution stabilizes a ground state with coexisting chiral domains, creating a tunable energy landscape for optical manipulation. Femtosecond photoexcitation then induces asymmetric and anisotropic switching from dominant to minority chiral domains, characterized by in-plane domain growth and a redistribution toward an achiral configuration. The switching occurs on a timescale comparable to a coherent phonon oscillation ($\sim$2 THz), revealing a phonon-mediated pathway that proceeds through a transient domain-wall state. Our results establish a broadly applicable strategy for engineering and controlling chiral order parameters through combined chemical and ultrafast optical tuning.

AI.tldr: 通过化学掺杂与飞秒光激发结合，实现了手性电荷密度波态的非热开关控制，揭示了声子介导的微观机制
AI.motivation: 量子材料中对称性破缺相的光学控制是一个核心目标，但确定性开关常受限于单畴基态的稳定性。1T-TaS₂中的手性电荷密度波为此提供了天然平台，但原始材料被锁定在单一手性中
AI.method: 结合化学掺杂（Ti取代）与飞秒光学激发，通过Ti掺杂稳定共存手性畴的基态，创建可调谐的能量景观用于光学操控
AI.result: 飞秒光激发诱导从主导手性畴到少数手性畴的不对称和各向异性开关，表现为面内畴生长和向非手性构型的重新分布。开关时间尺度与相干声子振荡相当（~2 THz），揭示了通过瞬态畴壁态的声子介导路径
AI.conclusion: 研究结果建立了通过化学和超快光学调谐相结合来工程化和控制手性序参数的广泛适用策略

title: Origin of the tetragonal-to-hexagonal phase transitions in Fe-doped BaTiO$_3$
summary: Based on detailed first-principles calculations, we investigate the tetragonal-to-hexagonal phase transition in Fe-doped BaTiO$_3$. Total energy calculations confirm a crossover from the tetragonal to hexagonal phases around 4\% Fe, in agreement with experimental observations, where comparative calculations show that neither CaTiO$_3$ nor SrTiO$_3$ exhibits similar behavior under equivalent substitution. Furthermore, three possible mechanisms are quantified: oxygen vacancies shift the crossover concentration from $\sim$4\% to $\sim$2\% through charge compensation, Jahn-Teller distortions impose a larger elastic penalty, both favoring tetragonal-to-hexagonal phase transitions; whereas the tolerance factor is reduced in comparison with that of pristine BaTiO$_3$ for reasonable Fe valence states, disfavoring the occurrence of the hexagonal phases. Detailed analysis on the electronic structure reveals that the charge redistribution induced by oxygen vacancy is strongly orbital dependent due to the local crystal structure distortions.

AI.tldr: Fe掺杂BaTiO₃中四方到六方相变的计算研究：4% Fe浓度时发生相变，氧空位使相变浓度降至2%，Jahn-Teller畸变促进相变，容忍因子抑制六方相形成
AI.motivation: 研究Fe掺杂BaTiO₃中四方到六方相变的机制，解释实验观察到的相变现象，并与CaTiO₃和SrTiO₃进行比较以理解材料特异性
AI.method: 采用第一性原理计算，进行总能计算分析相变，量化三种机制：氧空位电荷补偿效应、Jahn-Teller畸变弹性惩罚、容忍因子变化，并进行电子结构分析
AI.result: Fe掺杂BaTiO₃在约4%浓度时发生四方到六方相变，氧空位使相变浓度降至2%，Jahn-Teller畸变促进相变，容忍因子变化抑制六方相形成，电子结构显示氧空位引起的电荷重分布具有轨道依赖性
AI.conclusion: Fe掺杂BaTiO₃的四方到六方相变由多种竞争机制共同决定，其中氧空位和Jahn-Teller畸变促进相变，而容忍因子变化抑制相变，这些发现为理解掺杂钛酸钡的相变行为提供了重要见解

title: Dynamics of Aligning Active Matter: Mapping to a Schrödinger Equation and Exact Diagonalization
summary: There has been recent interest in the relaxational modes of small-scale fully connected systems of aligning self-propelled particles (Spera et al., Phys. Rev. Lett. {\bf 132}: 078301 (2024)). We revisit the classical connection between Fokker-Planck and Schrödinger equations to address this by means of exact diagonalization, allowing for rigorous analytical insight into the full spectrum. This allows us to extract exact results which we compare to the existing result from linearized statistical field theory. We derive asymptotically correct analytical results that improve upon the prior approximations. We show that this methodology can fruitfully be extended to the case of non-reciprocal interactions which gives rise to a non-Hermitian Schrödinger problem akin to those in open quantum mechanics. While the non-reciprocity can be chosen such as not to alter the stationary distribution, it fundamentally changes the nature of the steady state which we quantify via the entropy production. We discuss the case of low particle numbers as well as the emergence of mean-field dynamics at large numbers.

AI.tldr: 该论文重新审视Fokker-Planck与Schrödinger方程的经典联系，通过精确对角化方法研究小尺度全连接自推进粒子系统的弛豫模式，推导出比现有近似更准确的解析结果，并将方法扩展到非互易相互作用系统。
AI.motivation: 最近对小尺度全连接自推进粒子系统弛豫模式的研究兴趣（Spera等人，Phys. Rev. Lett. 132: 078301 (2024）），需要更精确的分析方法来理解这些系统的完整谱特性。
AI.method: 利用Fokker-Planck与Schrödinger方程的经典联系，采用精确对角化方法进行严格分析，推导渐近正确的解析结果，并将方法扩展到非互易相互作用系统，研究非厄米Schrödinger问题。
AI.result: 获得了比现有线性化统计场论近似更精确的解析结果，展示了非互易相互作用如何在不改变稳态分布的情况下改变稳态性质，并通过熵产生量化这种变化，分析了小粒子数和大粒子数极限下的行为。
AI.conclusion: 精确对角化方法为研究自推进粒子系统提供了严格的解析洞察，该方法可成功扩展到非互易相互作用系统，揭示了非互易性如何通过熵产生改变稳态性质，为理解小尺度系统和平均场动力学提供了新视角。

title: Exact density-functional theory as parallel ensemble variational hierarchies: from Lieb's formulation to Kohn-Sham theory
summary: Exact ground-state density-functional theory contains two parallel variational structures that are often compressed into a single narrative: an interacting hierarchy rooted in Lieb's ensemble formulation and a noninteracting hierarchy rooted in exact ensemble noninteracting theory. We reconstruct exact DFT around this parallel structure and distinguish both exact frameworks from the Kohn-Sham auxiliary density-functional construction that links them on a common admissible density class. From this viewpoint, the Levy-Lieb constrained search, the Hohenberg-Kohn picture, and ordinary pure-state noninteracting or Kohn-Sham formulations appear as narrower specializations under additional restrictions. The same organization also places fractional particle number, piecewise linearity, one-sided chemical potentials, derivative discontinuity, fractional orbital occupations, and Janak-type relations within a single variational picture. Exchange-correlation structure is reconsidered from the same standpoint, where it appears as the interface quantity between the interacting and noninteracting hierarchies rather than merely as the unknown remainder of the Kohn-Sham decomposition. The result is a formal reorganization of exact DFT that clarifies distinctions often blurred in compressed expositions, including functional domain versus representability class, noninteracting supporting-potential structure versus Kohn-Sham auxiliary construction, and density reproduction versus spectral interpretation.

AI.tldr: 论文重新组织精确密度泛函理论，区分相互作用与非相互作用两个变分层次，澄清Kohn-Sham辅助构造与精确理论的关系。
AI.motivation: 现有DFT表述通常将相互作用和非相互作用两个变分结构压缩为单一叙述，导致概念混淆。论文旨在重建精确DFT的平行结构，澄清不同理论框架之间的关系和区别。
AI.method: 基于Lieb的系综表述和精确系综非相互作用理论，重构精确DFT的平行变分结构。区分相互作用层次、非相互作用层次以及连接它们的Kohn-Sham辅助密度泛函构造。
AI.result: 建立了清晰的DFT组织形式：相互作用层次（Lieb系综）和非相互作用层次（精确系综非相互作用理论）通过Kohn-Sham构造在共同可容许密度类上连接。Levy-Lieb约束搜索、Hohenberg-Kohn图像和普通纯态Kohn-Sham表述成为该框架下的特例。
AI.conclusion: 重新组织的精确DFT框架澄清了压缩表述中常被模糊的概念区别：泛函定义域与可表示性类别、非相互作用支撑势结构与Kohn-Sham辅助构造、密度再现与谱解释。交换关联结构被重新定位为连接两个变分层次的界面量。

title: A $Γ$-valley Moiré Platform for Tunable Square Lattice Hubbard Model
comment: 9 pages, 6 figures, this work has been reported in Workshop for Topological Quantum Materials and Information (WTQI-2025) at ShanghaiTech University on 2025/11/16
summary: Moiré superlattices have emerged as a premier platform for simulating the Hubbard model, yet achieving high tunability in square-lattice systems remains a key challenge. We demonstrate that $Γ$-valley twisted square homobilayers provide a faithful and highly tunable realization of $t-t'-U$ Hubbard model, extending the recent proposal in M-valley systems. We show that at small twist angles, an emergent layer-exchange symmetry decouples electronic states into flat bands residing on two nested square sublattices.
